title: Platinum Vs Renewal Screenshots
wikitext:
[]: Platinum Vs. Renewal Screenshots             Quote Post by eva14 » Sun Feb 09, 2014 11:16 am Hi, I have 01 TEST-TYPE R2J DVD which is cool to own for the superb 5.1 audio and picture quality but I'm wondering how the US/UK Platinum Collection quality looks like? Comparison of Perfect Collection Vs. Renewal (01 TEST-TYPE) http://screenshotcomparison.com/comparison/57975/picture:0 I'm glad to have gotten rid of those horrible "Perfect" Collection DVDs.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Feb 09, 2014 12:04 pm Are you asking how the Japanese Renewal looks compared to the US/UK Platinum release? Well I know that the Japanese Renewal and US Platinum are better than the UK release. I heard bad things about the conversion to PAL. I believe, as is usually the case, the Japanese Renewal release is a little better quality-wise than the US release. Not significantly, but video-philes will notice. As far as the Perfect Collection goes... FRAME JITTER... once you notice it... UGH.

[]:             Quote Post by eva14 » Sun Feb 09, 2014 12:15 pm Precisely but that response is more than enough. Thank you. I live in UK and the R2 Platinum Collection is more suitable to me because I can watch it on my 360/PS3 whereas the R1 PC couldn't. I guess I'll be fine with a slightly inferior picture quality than the US PC release.
